main.description: The sextant.workflow/v1 state envelope (ADR-0011), Layer-1 reference shape. Held as an Artifact keyed by workflow id, single-writer (the owner) and CAS-checkpointed. The $type is versioned (sextant.workflow/v1), so the shape evolves without a protocol epoch bump. Steps are a FLAT status list the coordinator walks — the substrate bakes in no transition logic.

id.description: The workflow id (a ULID); the key of the state artifact.

owner.description: The coordinator client id that owns (single-writes) this envelope.

steps.description: The steps, in order. The coordinator walks them; a resumed coordinator skips those already done.

id.description: Step id, unique within the workflow.

kind.description: Step kind. 'dispatch' stands up an agent (composing the M5.2 dispatcher).

nickname.description: For a dispatch step: the requested name for the spawned agent.

prompt.description: For a dispatch step: the task handed to the agent.

agent.description: The dispatched agent's bus id, filled from the spawn.ack.
